name_en: Top-tier Original Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷 M82930
name_cn:
Top-tier Original Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷 M82930
This Rosalie coin purse is made from Monogram Empreinte embossed soft-grain calfskin leather, opening with a smooth snap button. It features a zip coin pocket, slip pocket, and card slots. The Louis Vuitton engraved snap button ensures a secure closure.
Size: 11 x 8 x 2.5 cm
